title: cyanus thirkei
intro: Cyanus thirkei, also known as Cornflower, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the daisy family and is native to Europe and Western Asia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which help to soothe and calm irritated skin, wounds, and eye issues. The health benefits of Cyanus thirkei include reducing inflammation, improving sleep quality, and providing relief from anxiety and stress. Herbal preparations of Cornflower include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support eye health, calm digestive issues, and promote relaxation.
